response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 82
REASON: The core legal content (ADEA, age 40+, 20+ employees, disparate impact, reasonable factor other than age) is accurate, but this does not match the actual EEOC Compliance Manual Section 8 format or publication date, and specific language about graduation-year filters and social-platform usage patterns appears to be editorially invented rather than drawn from an official EEOC document.
